title: AIMS stance-evaluation performance artifact
description: Schema reference for validate_performance.py. Validation is implemented in Python rather than a JSON Schema library to avoid runtime dependencies. Deterministic accountability artifact for the AI qualitative layer (#97), sharing the data/performance/ home planned for realized-return tracking (#82).

notes.generated_at: Analysis-date midnight UTC, mirroring the analysis artifact; never wall-clock time.
notes.determinism: The artifact derives exclusively from committed data/analysis/ and data/qualitative/ files — no live price fetches. Rebuilding from the same inputs is byte-identical.
notes.forward_returns: Per-symbol forward returns are compounded from the trailing ret_1d feature chained across analysis artifacts, keyed by the per-symbol bar date in metadata.data_freshness. Wherever a later artifact carries ret_5d, the compounded product of the trailing five chained ret_1d values must reproduce it within config.return_consistency_tolerance; a mismatch marks the affected links broken and observations spanning them are skipped (counted in broken_chain) instead of scored.
notes.horizons: config.horizons lists forward horizons in trading bars (default [1, 5, 20]); stance_evaluation.horizons carries one entry per horizon keyed '<h>d'.
notes.hit_definition: supportive hits when the forward return is > 0; conflicting hits when it is < 0 (a conflicting stance on a top-ranked instrument predicts underperformance); neutral stances are counted and averaged but never scored directionally (hit_rate stays null).
notes.confidence_calibration: Hit rates of directional stances (supportive + conflicting) grouped by the model's stated confidence; higher confidence should show a higher hit rate.
notes.gating: Stance entries carrying non-empty qualitative_gates were withheld from rendering and are excluded from evaluation (counted in excluded_gated). unmatched counts entries whose symbol has no chained bar for the stance date.
notes.pending: Stances newer than the horizon (not enough subsequent committed bars) are counted as pending and mature in later runs; the artifact is regenerated from scratch daily.
notes.empty_state: With no qualitative artifacts, the artifact is still written with zero counts and a warning — safe empty-state behavior until production stance data accumulates.
notes.disclaimer: Embedded verbatim in every artifact and rendered prominently on the evaluation page: results measure informational association only, never an investable or executable track record.
